name: Apex Golf Club
address: 18039 SW Lower Boones Ferry Rd, Tigard, OR 97224
about: Apex Golf Club is an indoor golf and bar facility in Tigard, Oregon, featuring GolfZon simulator technology. The venue offers private bays for hourly play, along with a full-service bar and kitchen. It caters to all skill levels with a focus on providing a premium, year-round golf experience complemented by a lounge atmosphere and social amenities. The club supports various activities including leagues, lessons, corporate events, and private parties with food and beverage service.
why_golfers_like_it: Cutting-edge GolfZon simulator technology with tour-level accuracy
Full bar and kitchen service delivered directly to the bay
Private bays accommodating up to 6 players for group play
Beginner-friendly environment with complimentary club rentals
Year-round indoor golf experience unaffected by weather

food_and_drink.notes: Curated menu of snacks and shareables available for delivery to bays
Full bar service with craft cocktails, local beers, and beverage delivery to bays

simulator_hardware.notes: High-speed overhead cameras providing tour-level data on ball speed, launch angle, and spin rate with moving swing plates and auto-tee technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary high-quality clubs are provided for all guests.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned as allowed. The venue provides a full bar and kitchen with food and beverage service delivered to your bay.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It is recommended to allow 4 players for a full 18-hole round, though specific time frames are not detailed.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes all skill levels and mentions birthday parties as an option, indicating it is suitable for families and children.
